title: Adaptive Circuit Breaker
prompt: Implement an adaptive circuit breaker for an external API. The API degrades slowly through increased latency rather than outright failures. React to latency trends, not just error counts, automatically adjust thresholds over time, support half-open recovery, and expose the current breaker state.
rubric: Implements every explicit requirement named in the prompt
Correctly handles the hard cases the prompt calls out (concurrency, crashes, duplicates, ordering, recovery, etc.)
Code is complete and coherent enough to run, not pseudocode or stubs
No correctness bugs in the core algorithm or data structures
